creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #12 r327502: Tue Jan  2 22:19:51 CET 2018 amd64, still the same, my kernel has these options enabled:

options        KDTRACE_FRAME           # Ensure frames are compiled in
options        KDTRACE_HOOKS           # Kernel DTrace hooks

The problem occurs on all of our boxes (at least 4) with revision >327350.
